title: Hornet Removal in Astoria, Queens | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal in Astoria, Queens. Safe, effective nest elimination from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Hornets can pose serious threats to residents and businesses throughout Astoria, Queens, especially during warmer months when these aggressive stinging insects build nests in eaves, trees, and building overhangs. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services to protect your family, customers, and property from dangerous encounters. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations with proven methods tailored to Astoria's unique residential and commercial landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Astoria for years with licensed, insured technicians who understand the specific pest challenges of this diverse Queens neighborhood. We offer same-day service, transparent pricing between $350-$550, and guaranteed results that keep your property hornet-free throughout the season.
localContext: From the brownstones and pre-war apartment buildings along Ditmars Boulevard to the bustling commercial areas near Steinway Street and the waterfront properties along Astoria Park, hornets can nest anywhere in this vibrant neighborhood. Our team is familiar with Astoria's mix of residential homes, Greek restaurants, family-owned businesses, and historic architecture, allowing us to provide discreet, effective hornet removal that respects your property and community.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Astoria?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service throughout Astoria, Queens. Our technicians can typically eliminate a hornet nest within 1-2 hours of arrival, depending on the nest's size and location. We prioritize emergency calls where hornets pose immediate danger to children, pets, or high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest elimination using professional-grade products, removal of the physical nest structure when accessible, treatment of the surrounding area to deter returning hornets, and a 30-day warranty. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements for safe removal.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Astoria, Queens?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets are common throughout Astoria, particularly in areas near Astoria Park, along tree-lined residential streets, and around older buildings with protected eaves and overhangs. The neighborhood's proximity to green spaces and mature trees provides ideal nesting conditions. We typically see increased hornet activity from May through October, with peak nest building in June and July.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and neighbors during hornet removal. We establish safety perimeters, work during optimal times when hornets are less active, and provide clear instructions for re-entry. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during treatment and for 2-3 hours afterward as a precaution.
